civilopediaText.text: War!
Enemy country has finally rejected our ultimatum
Then, we have officially declared war.

choices.text: We must show them what that means.

civilopediaText.text: War!
They and we were neutral or friendly to each other, but we officially declared war on their country.
Our people were shocked and unfortunately public opinion was antiwar.
War!
War has been declared against our nation.
Mobilization has already begun in the enemy nation,
and battle is already going in some areas.
In any cases, their demands were simply unacceptable, and this outcome was inevitable.
Local News
Breaking:Military clash on our country's border has already resulted in 100 deaths!

uniques: Only available <when number of [War Support] is more than [40]>
[+100]% weight to this choice for AI decisions

civilopediaText.text: Local News
Breaking: The casualties from the ongoing conflict in our country has surpassed 500!

choices.text: The enemy will surely fall before a fortress made of our blood
uniques: Only available <when number of [War Support] is more than [60]>
[+100]% weight to this choice for AI decisions

civilopediaText.text: World News
Breaking:The total dies in that war reached 1,000. It is definitely one of the largest wars in recent history. The situation is not irreversible.

choices.text: We will fight to the last drop of blood!
uniques: Triggers the following global alert: [Casualties reached 1000]
Only available <when number of [War Support] is more than [80]>
[+100]% weight to this choice for AI decisions
Triggers the following global alert: [Casualties reached 1000]

civilopediaText.text: Military Reform
The age of chivalry is gone. War is no longer an affair of honor and courtesy; it has become vast, impersonal, and calculated.
We must modernize our military to survive in a new era.

uniques: Set [Bool Military Reform] to [1] <hidden from users>
[+50]% weight to this choice for AI decisions

choices.text: Conscription should be made a national obligation. We don't want unpatriotic soldiers.
uniques: Set [Bool Military Reform] to [1] <hidden from users>

civilopediaText.text: Mobilization

uniques: Comment [Goods for military are produced at a minimum level]
[+25]% weight to this choice for AI decisions <when not at war> <when number of [Goods] is more than [1000]>
Comment [5% of production will used to produce Goods (1:5 rate). +10% Production while building War plants]
[+25]% weight to this choice for AI decisions <when not at war> <when number of [Goods] is less than [1000]>
Comment [10% of production will used to produce Goods (1:5 rate). +20% Production while building War plants]
[+25]% weight to this choice for AI decisions <when at war> <when number of [Goods] is more than [1000]>
Comment [20% of production will used to produce Goods (1:5 rate). +40% Production while building War plants]
Triggers the following global alert: [National Mobilization Law adopted]
[+25]% weight to this choice for AI decisions <when at war> <when number of [Goods] is less than [1000]>

civilopediaText.text: Mass Destructive Weapon Dropped!
One day, there was a single dot in the sky. It was a bomber. Then the dot became two. It seems bomb had been dropped.
But it was not normal bomb. What you had done had caused a genocide that could never be undone.
People closest to the hypocenter were vaporized, down to their bones,
while people further away were exposed to the light, their skin and eyes melting.
It was a scene more terrifying than hell.
The world was shocked by the mass destructive power of this new weapon.
After that day, humans got a weapon that enough to wipe out its own existence.

choices.text: We must show them what that means.
